raw.name: Aberlour 12 Year Old Double Cask Matured

tasting_notes.nose: Soft and rounded with fruity notes of red apples.
tasting_notes.palate: Fine sherried character, balanced with rich chocolate, toffee, cinnamon and ginger spiciness.
tasting_notes.finish: Warming and lingering - sweet and slightly spicy.

raw.name: Aberlour 16 Year Old Double Cask Matured

tasting_notes.nose: Rich, scented floral and sweet raisin aromas with spicy nuttiness.
tasting_notes.palate: Smooth and full with sweet floral and spicy flavors, and a hint of plum and oak.

tasting_notes.nose: Aromas of mixed spices, praline and spiced orange harmonising with rich, deep notes of Oloroso sherry.
tasting_notes.palate: Orange, black cherries, dried fruit and ginger spiked with dark bitter chocolate and enriched with sherry and oak. Full bodied and creamy.
tasting_notes.finish: Robust and intense with bitter-sweet notes of exotic spices, dark chocolate and oak.
